utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Which one do you think she is ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , no thanks , we are just here to observe .

utterances.speaker: Teacher
utterances.text: You do not observe a dance class . You dance a dance class .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I think she means You dance a dance class .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , do you see anybody you think could be me ?

utterances.speaker: Teacher
utterances.text: People ! Last time there were some empty yoghurt containers lying around after class . Let not have that happen again !

emotion_cause.span: 10_Last time there were some empty yoghurt containers lying around after class .

utterances.speaker: Teacher
utterances.text: Let get started . Five , six , a ... five six seven eight ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , I am not getting this !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Did you ever feel like sometimes you are just so unbelievably uncoordinated ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_feel like sometimes you are just so unbelievably uncoordinated

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ? You just click when they click .

emotion_cause.span: 15_Did you ever feel like sometimes you are just so unbelievably uncoordinated ?

utterances.speaker: Teacher
utterances.text: Alright people , now everyone grab a partner .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay . And , my , dead , mother , says , you , are , it . I am with Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Great . It is gym class all over again .
